texto: Some people discard their childhood like an old hat. They forget about it like a phone number that's no longer valid. They used to be kids, then they became adults - but what are they now?Only those who grow up but continue to be children are humans.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Erick Kästner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Some people discard their childhood like an old hat. They forget about it like a phone number tha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, adults, childhood pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de childhood e grow-up.
